Index.title: Spacery | Digital Laboratory
Index.description: Welcome to my secret digital lair. I build fast, pretty, and occasionally weird web stuff for the curious souls.

archive.title: Lab Archives
archive.description: A collection of weird things I've built. Pick a category to find the specific tool you need for your mission today.
archive.empty: Nothing here. Try moving a bit to the left.

privacy.title: Privacy (We're Cool)
privacy.desc: Your data stays with you. Everything is processed right in your browser. We don't keep anything—definitely not your secrets.

performance.title: Stupidly Fast
performance.desc: Built with the latest tech so it goes zoom. Turbo mode is definitely on!

support.title: Robot Help
support.desc: Part of the Spacery open-source family. Double-checked by my droids for maximum stability.

image-compressor.title: Image Squeezer
image-compressor.desc: Shrink your images so they don't take up too much space-mass.

image-filters.title: Vibe Filters
image-filters.desc: Add some visual spice: black/white, bright, or blurry for that aesthetic look.

image-resizer.title: Aspect Resizer
image-resizer.desc: Change dimensions while keeping things in proportion. No squashed faces here.

image-cropper.title: Edge Trimmer
image-cropper.desc: Cut out the noise and focus on what matters in your visuals.

svg-optimizer.title: SVG Diet
svg-optimizer.desc: Strip away the bloat from your vector files for a faster web.

image-converter.title: Format Shifter
image-converter.desc: Switch between JPG, PNG, and WEBP like a galactic changeling.

video-compressor.title: Video Shrinker
video-compressor.desc: High-efficiency diet for your heavy video files.

video-cutter.title: Scene Sniper
video-cutter.desc: Trim your footage with surgical precision. Only the best parts survive.

video-to-gif.title: GIF-inator
video-to-gif.desc: Turn your clips into looping pieces of internet history.

video-muter.title: Silence Protocol
video-muter.desc: Remove audio tracks instantly. Shhh, we're working here.

pdf-compressor.title: PDF Crusher
pdf-compressor.desc: Fold your PDFs until they're small enough to fit in a pocket dimension.

pdf-merge.title: PDF Glue
pdf-merge.desc: Stick multiple documents together into one consolidated masterpiece.

image-to-pdf.title: Paper-izer
image-to-pdf.desc: Wrap your images into a shiny new PDF document.

docx-compressor.title: Word Shrinker
docx-compressor.desc: Minimize document mass for faster galactic delivery.

json-formatter.title: JSON Untangler
json-formatter.desc: Make messy JSON data look like a neat row of robots.

css-minifier.title: Code Crusher
css-minifier.desc: Squeeze your CSS until it's as small as a single line of logic.

base64-converter.title: Decoder Ring
base64-converter.desc: Convert strings to Base64 and back. Top-secret data only.

cosmic-password.title: Fortress Maker
cosmic-password.desc: Generate passwords so strong even a supercomputer would give up.

case-converter.title: Case Swapper
case-converter.desc: Switch between UPPERCASE, lowercase, and everything in between.

url-pulse-checker.title: Link Untangler
url-pulse-checker.desc: Clean up those long, messy URLs into something decent.

reading-refiner.title: Bionic Vision
reading-refiner.desc: Hack your brain to read faster by bolding the start of every word.

regex-tester.title: Pattern Puzzler
regex-tester.desc: Live feedback for your Regular Expressions. No more guessing.

random-choice-maker.title: Fate Decider
random-choice-maker.desc: Let the void choose. Pick a random item from your list.

unit-converter.title: Unit Swapper
unit-converter.desc: Convert anything from inches to light-years in a blink.

age-calculator.title: Time Tracker
age-calculator.desc: Exactly how many seconds have you been orbiting the sun?

discount-calculator.title: Deal Finder
discount-calculator.desc: Calculate savings during galactic sales. Don't overpay for that rocket.

currency-converter.title: Money Shifter
currency-converter.desc: Swap between currencies with live exchange rates from across the globe.

color-palette.title: Vibe Painter
color-palette.desc: Generate beautiful color schemes for your next big project.

qr-generator.title: Code Square Maker
qr-generator.desc: Create high-quality QR codes for instant data beaming.

glassmorphism-generator.title: Frosted Glass Maker
glassmorphism-generator.desc: Design gorgeous frosty UI components with live CSS code.

color-extractor.title: Color Picker Droid
color-extractor.desc: Grab the exact hex codes from any image instantly.

About.title: The Guy Behind the Screen
About.description: Just a human who spent way too long staring at glowing rectangles until my eyes turned square. I like building things that are fast, shiny, and exist just because... why not? Welcome to my little corner of the void.

hustle.label: Main Hustle
hustle.value: Expert at turning coffee into magic code.

status.label: Signal Status
status.value: Looking for cool stuff to build!

Bot.title: Spacery Terminal
Bot.placeholder: Send a transmission... (tag @spacery to trigger AI)
Bot.tagRequired: You must tag @spacery for a response.

descriptions.frontend: Building tough, fast, and pretty interfaces with modern frameworks.

Contact.title: Spacery HQ
Contact.description: Experimental digital lair for people who like to push buttons. 🛸
Contact.copyright: © 2026 SPACERY LABORATORY. BUIDL WITH LOVE & COFFEE.

grid.title: Toys & Experiments
grid.subtitle: Play for free. No star-coins required.

sky-glide.title: Sky Glide
sky-glide.desc: Learn to fly. Navigate through energy poles without crashing (hopefully).

stellar-oracle.title: Stellar Oracle
stellar-oracle.desc: Vent to the stars. They might actually Have an answer.

space-typer.title: Space Typer
space-typer.desc: How fast are your thumbs? Type cosmic words before the clock runs out.

orbit-defense.title: Orbit Defense
orbit-defense.desc: Protect our station from stray space junk flying around.

void-runner.title: Void Runner
void-runner.desc: Running in the void. Test your reflexes before you miss the rocket.

sky-glide.title: Sky Glide
sky-glide.registry: Your name will be etched into the galaxy guestbook. No weird aliases, please.

stellar-oracle.title: Stellar Oracle
stellar-oracle.description: The stars have observed your journey since the dawn of time (not in a creepy way, I promise). Want to vent to the universe?

cosmic-clicker.title: Cosmic Clicker
cosmic-clicker.autoSave: Don't worry, aliens record your progress every 5 seconds.

miner.name: Mining Drone
miner.desc: A tiny robot to pick up cosmic dust.

collector.name: Star Sucker
collector.desc: Sucks even more energy from neighboring stars.

swarm.name: Dyson Swarm
swarm.desc: A giant mirror network to capture sun-power.

space-typer.title: Galactic Keyboard
space-typer.hint: Escape: Quick Reset // Space: Normal Space

Construction.title: Under Recalibration
Construction.desc: Maintenance droids are currently duct-taping the logic circuits for the {category} module. Hang tight while they find where they dropped the wrench.
